title: agropyron puberulum
intro: Agropyron puberulum, also known as pubescent wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Agropyron puberulum include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or supplements, and is often consumed fresh or dried to reap its nutritional and medicinal benefits.
